name: Coding
description: AI-powered web development toolkit: Lighthouse audits, SEO analysis, site crawling, deployment management, and issue tracking

events.name: audit_complete
events.description: A Lighthouse or SEO audit finished

events.name: deploy_triggered
events.description: A deployment was triggered for a project

events.name: crawl_complete
events.description: A site crawl finished discovering pages

events.name: issue_created
events.description: A new issue or ticket was created

actions.name: run_lighthouse
actions.description: Run a full Lighthouse audit via PageSpeed Insights

actions.name: trigger_deploy
actions.description: Trigger a new deployment for a project

actions.name: crawl_site
actions.description: Crawl a site to discover pages, check status codes and links

actions.name: analyze_seo
actions.description: Full SEO analysis including meta tags, OG, headings, and structured data

actions.name: create_issue
actions.description: Create a new issue or ticket in a project

actions.name: find_broken_links
actions.description: Check every link on a page for 404s and timeouts
